generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in the Pacific are now contributing 22% more to collective defense than just 5 years ago? While some politicians try to scare us into thinking we're carrying the whole burden, the facts show a different picture. Our commitment to alliances isn't just about us writing checks - it's about shared responsibility and mutual security. Let's not let fearmongering distract from the real progress we're making together. #StrongAlliances #SharedSecurity
